paragraph: I'm a full-stack developer based in Cebu City, Philippines, graduating Magna Cum Laude with a BSIT degree. I work across the stack — from React and Next.js interfaces to NestJS and FastAPI backends — and I care as much about how a product feels to use as how it's engineered underneath.
